title: Intensely Citrusy Italian Chicken Wings Stew
description: A citrusy and gooey Italian stew featuring chicken wings, inspired by the Ligurian cuisine, perfect for a high-protein meal. This dish is cooked in a kazan-cauldron to bring out the intense flavors.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a kazan-cauldron over medium heat.
Add the garlic and onion and cook until the onion is translucent.
Add the chicken wings and cook until browned on all sides.
Add the lemon juice, orange juice, Italian seasoning, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 30 minutes.
Stir the stew occasionally to prevent the chicken from sticking to the bottom of the cauldron.
After 30 minutes, remove the chicken from the cauldron and set it aside to rest.
Continue to simmer the sauce for another 10 minutes, stirring occasionally, until it has thickened slightly.
Return the chicken to the cauldron and stir to coat with the sauce.
Serve the chicken wings hot, garnished with fresh herbs if desired.
